deliberate_omissions: How the dashboard is accessed and who is authorized

target_fire_rationale: The word 'screen' suppresses the design-flow and frontend-surface checks, but the journey, navigation, and frontend binding are genuinely undescribed. An inquisitive engine (IMP-015) should still ask.
